title: Meta cuts contractors who reported seeing Ray-Ban Meta users have sex
description: Meta said the Kenyan workers didn't "meet our standards."

title: Researchers try to cut the genetic code from 20 to 19 amino acids
description: Using AI tools, the team reworked part of the ribosome to need one less amino acid.

title: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too
description: OpenAI will begin rolling out it cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.

title: Blue Origin certainly has ambitious launch targets for New Glenn
description: If Blue Origin wants to launch New Glenn 100 times a year, we're here for it.

title: Stranded traveler gets more than he bargained for in Resident Evil teaser
description: Fresh off the Oscar-winning Weapons, director Zach Cregger has his own vision for the gaming franchise.

title: Musk v. Altman Kicks Off, DOJ Guts Voting Rights Unit, and Is the AI Job Apocalypse Overhyped?
description: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, we get into how the Elon Musk-Sam Altman trial goes way beyond their rivalry and could have major implications both for OpenAI and also the AI industry at large.

title: Exclusive eBook: Inside the stealthy startup that pitched brainless human clones
description: The ultimate plan to live forever is a brand new body. This subscriber-only eBook explores R3 Bio, a small startup that has pitched a startling and ethically charged vision for “brainless clones” to serve the role of backup human bodies. by Antonio Regalado March 20, 2026 Related Stories

title: OpenAI announces new advanced security for ChatGPT accounts, including a partnership with Yubico
description: OpenAI is launching additional opt-in protections for ChatGPT accounts. The new security initiative includes a new partnership with security key provider Yubico.

title: Elon Musk testifies that xAI trained Grok on OpenAI models
description: "Distillation" is a hot topic as frontier labs try to prevent smaller competitors from copying their models.

title: FDA approval, fundraising, and the reality of building in healthcare according to BioticsAI founder
description: BioticsAI CEO Robhy Bustami joined Isabelle Johannessen on Build Mode to discuss how the company has navigated a highly regulated space and kept the team motivated while cutting through all the red tape.

title: Beijing bans drone sales even as rest of world buys Chinese drones
description: Beijing's citywide ban restricts the sale, transport, and storage of drones.

title: Google’s Gemini AI assistant is hitting the road in millions of vehicles
description: The move signals Google’s push to bring more advanced, conversational AI into the driving experience.

title: Elon Musk Seemingly Admits xAI Has Used OpenAI’s Models to Train Its Own
description: While answering questions under oath, Musk argued it’s standard practice for AI labs to use their competitors’ models.

title: OpenAI Rolls Out ‘Advanced’ Security Mode for At-Risk Accounts
description: OpenAI is rolling out Advanced Account Security for people concerned that their ChatGPT or Codex accounts could be potential targets of phishing attacks.

title: This startup’s new mechanistic interpretability tool lets you debug LLMs
description: The San Francisco–based startup Goodfire just released a new tool, called Silico, that lets researchers and engineers peer inside an AI model and adjust its parameters—the settings that determine a model’s behavior—during training. title: The Download: the North Pole’s future and humanoid data
description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. title: These Men Allegedly Profit Off Teaching People How to Make AI Porn
description: Three Arizona women have filed a lawsuit against a group of men that alleges they used the women’s photos to make AI porn influencers, then offered online courses showing others how to do it.

title: Reid Hoffman Thinks Doctors Should Ask AI for a Second Opinion
description: The LinkedIn cofounder now has an AI drug discovery startup—and thinks not asking chatbots for medical advice is “bordering on committing malpractice.”

title: The Download: storing nuclear waste and orchestrating agents
description: This is today’s edition of The Download, our weekday newsletter that provides a daily dose of what’s going on in the world of technology. description: Today, nuclear energy enjoys a rare moment of support across the political spectrum in the US. title: Understanding Convolutions on Graphs
description: Understanding the building blocks and design choices of graph neural networks.

title: A Gentle Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Adversarial Reprogramming of Neural Cellular Automata
description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
